view.title: Buka iSeva {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuthuma kabusha i-imeyili yamukelekile?
view.emailSentMessage: I-imeyili yamukelekile ithunyelwe kabusha. Hlola ibhokisi lakho lokungenayo.

reverseDns.title: Izilungiselelo Ze-Reverse DNS
reverseDns.changeWarning: Izinguquko ze-reverse DNS zithatha isikhathi esingange-awa elilodwa ukuvela.

ipmiLive.title: I-IP ye-IPMI
ipmiLive.description: Nikeza i-IP ephilayo ku-IPMI controller ekhawulelwe ku-IP yakho futhi ikhawulelwe ezihlandleni ezingama-24 zokusebenzisa.

order.title: Oda iSeva
order.hostnameHelp: Sebenzisa igama lomphathi ukuhlonza iseva. Idomeini ayidinga ukuba evumelekile noma ibhaliswe. Ikhona indawo eyodwa efunekayo egameni lomphathi. Ezinye izibonelo: database.local, web.server noma your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Qaphela: Iphasiwedi kufanele ibe nezinhlamvu ezingekho ngaphansi kwezi-8, uhlamvu oluncane olulodwa, uhlamvu olukhulu olulodwa, inombolo eyodwa, noPhawu olukhethekile.
order.autoRenewNotice: Isignitshimenti sizavuselelwa ngokwenzakala ngemuva kwenyanga yonke ku-{cost} kuze kuyeke.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Ngokuhlola leli bhokisi, uyavuma ukuthi uyathengisa umkhiqizo wesignitshimenti ovuselelwa ngokwenzakala (Njengoba Kuchazwe Emigomeni Engenhla) futhi ubhalelwa ekhadi lesikweletu onikheza lona namhlanje. Uma ufuna ukuphila ukuvuselelwa kwakho ngokwenzakala, ungakwazi ukufinyelela iportal yabasebenzisi ukhethe insizakalo evumelekile bese uchofoza isixhumanisi Sokukhansela noma uthumele ngeposi ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net noma usebenzise enye indlela echazwe Emigomeni Nezimiso. Ngokuhlola ibhokisi bese uchofoza Beka Isikhungo Sami engezansi, uyavuma ukuthi ufundile, uqonda, futhi uyavuma Imigomo Nezimiso kanye noNqubomgomo Wobumfihlo wethu.
